rulings.Case Title: THEDA FUNG VS. SUSANA MANCIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Answer And Affirmative Defenses Of Defendant Samir F. Daher Dba Daher Realty Group Dba Prestige Real Estate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 8, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF THEDA FUNG's Motion To Strike Answer And Affirmative Defenses Of Defendant Samir F. Daher Dba Daher Realty Group DBA Prestige Real Estate moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THEDA FUNG VS. SUSANA MANCIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 8, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF THEDA FUNG's DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Defendant to (1) identifies the paragraphs that are admitted (paragraph 3b of form answer); (2) to allege facts in support of each affirmative defense; and (3) remove defenses that are not proper "affirmative defenses," e.g. "Punitive Damages" = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SARAH HUNTOON ET AL VS. STEFAN ERIC ADLER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 8, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANTs STEFAN ADLER and JENNIFER ROSDAIL's Motion For Judgment On Pleadings GRANTED. Causes of action subject to this motion have been released in a valid binding settlement agreement. Plaintiff cites no authorities on point for the arguments made regarding the Settlement Agreement being null and void (unlawful object, habitability, fraud). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BINGSEN LI VS. OCWEN LOAN SERVICING ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 8, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING's Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend Plaintiff's late filed opposition is stricken. Defendant's unopposed motion to dismiss is GRANTED. = (501/REQ)
